app.rdg: 1. Telh o as oshakitob a kwi Sherk-Siam ku atsilhtalbihu dhual ku tskwadads halgwa?
1. t蓹涩 蕯u g史蓹蕯us虒蓹bit蓹b 蕯蓹 k史i s虒蓹q si蕯ab k史i 蕯aci涩talbix史 dx史蕯al k史i d岫簧檏始史adads h蓹lg史蓹蕯.
1. true Q mercy of the sky nobleman the people toward the sins their
1. Is it true that God has mercy on the people because of their sins?
E, abil' gwat gwa rahab tolal ku tskwadads,
蕯i, 蕯蓹bil始 g史at g史蓹x虒ah蓹b tul始al k史i d岫簧檏始史adads,
yes if somebody cries about the sin+his
Yes, if a person repents of their sins,
gwa asra'tledhu kwi gwas hoyils halh;
g史蓹sx虒虒a茮'蓹dx史 k史i g史蓹shuyils ha蕯涩;
want the make good
and make themselves good
gula telh gwa oshabitob a Sherk-Siam dhual ku tskwadads.
g史蓹l t蓹涩 g史蓹蕯us虒蓹bit蓹b 蕯蓹 s虒蓹q si蕯ab dx史蕯al k史i d岫簧檏始史adads.
then truly mercy of the sky nobleman unto the sins+his
then God will indeed have mercy on his sins.
2. Abil o gwat ahus hoyudab whe ku tskwadads dhual di Sherk-Siam, gula stab kwi gwa siayus?
2. 蕯蓹bil始 蕯u g史at蓹x史s huyud蓹b x史i蕯 k史i d岫簧檏始史adads dx史蕯al di蕯 s虒蓹q si蕯ab, g史蓹l stab k史i g史蓹syayus.
2. perhaps Q who done not the sin unto the sky nobleman then what the work
2. Who perhaps has not done any sin unto God then what will he do?
Abil gwat ahus hoyudab whe ku tskwadads dhual di Sherk-Siam, gula kudad ku stsaiku;
蕯蓹bil始 g史at蓹x史s huyud蓹b x史i蕯 k史i d岫簧檏始史adads dx史蕯al di蕯 s虒蓹q si蕯ab, g史蓹l k史蓹dad k史i sc虝a蕯k史;
then what done not the sin unto that sky nobleman, then take the baptism
abil gwat astsaku gula gwa yayus aku tsaku dhual rarasmilalam.
蕯蓹bil始 g史at 蕯蓹sc虝a蕯k史 g史蓹l g史蓹yayus 蕯蓹 k史i sc虝a蕯k史 dx史蕯al x虒虒a蕯x虒虒虒a蕯sbillala蕯蓹b.
if someone baptized then works of the baptism??? to confession
3. Abil o Sherk-Siam gwa oshabid ku atsilhtalbihu dhual ku tskwadads halgwa, gula gwa hoyil o halh ku seles halgwa?
3. 蕯蓹bil始 蕯u s虒蓹q si蕯ab g史蓹蕯us虒蓹bid k史i 蕯aci涩talbix史 dx史蕯al k史i d岫簧檏始史adads h蓹lg史蓹蕯, g史蓹l g史蓹huyil 蕯u ha蕯涩 k史i sh蓹li蕯s h蓹lg史蓹蕯.
3. perhaps Q sky nobleman save the people from the sins their then make Q good the souls their
3. Will God perhaps save the people from their sins and make their soul good?
E, abil Sherk-Siam gwa oshabid ku atsilhtalbihu dhual ku tskwadads halgwa,
蕯i, 蕯蓹bil始 s虒蓹q si蕯ab g史蓹蕯us虒蓹bid k史i 蕯aciltalbix史 dx史蕯al k史i d岫簧檏始史adads h蓹lg史蓹蕯,
yes, perhaps sky nobleman save the people from the sins their
Yes, perhaps God will save the people from their sins
gula gwa bechad ku sgwas sabalekus dhual ku sales halgwa,
g史蓹l g史蓹b蓹c虒ad k史i sg史a蕯s s蕯abalik史s dx史蕯al k史i sh蓹li蕯s h蓹lg史蓹蕯,
then ??? ??? ??? unto the life their
gwla asista gwa dahu hois halh ku seles halgwa.
g史蓹l 蕯蓹s蕯ist蓹蕯 g史蓹dx史huys ha蕯涩 k史i sh蓹li蕯s h蓹lg史蓹蕯.
then this way+make good the souls their
and this is how he will make their souls good.
